text.title: Puppeteer Page Interaction (Selectors, Clicks, Forms) Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the puppeteer-page-interaction methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inspect-dom
step.action: Fetch page.content(); identify stable attributes (data-testid > id > name > aria-label) for each interactive element of interest.

step.name: ban-list
step.action: Build a block list of third-party domains (analytics, ads, fullstory, hotjar). Used to wire request interception.

step.name: emit-interaction-helpers
step.action: Write helpers clickByTestId/typeByTestId/selectByTestId that always waitForSelector first, then perform the native action.

step.name: wire-interception
step.action: Wrap page setup to call setRequestInterception(true) and abort matching requests. Allow critical APIs through.

step.name: form-submit-and-wait-response
step.action: Submit via page.click + Promise.all([page.waitForResponse(API_URL), page.click(submit)]) so the next step can read the API response.
